Label the models/posters of this station with the # that corresponds to the appropriate vessels involved in pulmonary circulation using the colored tape. When you have finished, have your TA check your labeling. Before leaving the station, remove all of the labels you have placed on the models/posters. #1 pulmonary trunk #2 pulmonary arteries #3 pulmonary capillaries #4 pulmonary veins 90 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK
